code:
%%{Security_IntrusionDetection}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-03.01 — Proposal Lifecycle (Security_Encryption)

[Security_Firewall] --> DRAFT : ProposalCreated (Security_ZeroTrust)
note right of DRAFT
  Authoring & validation:
  • proposalId assigned
  • schema/policy checks
end note

DRAFT --> REVIEW : SubmittedForReview
note right of REVIEW
  Guard reviews (Security_IntrusionDetection)
  Can request changes or reject
end note

REVIEW --> DRAFT : ChangesRequested
REVIEW --> REJECTED : RejectedAtReview
REVIEW --> OPEN_FOR_VOTE : ApprovedForVoting (Security_Encryption)

OPEN_FOR_VOTE --> OPEN_FOR_VOTE : VoteCast (Security_IntrusionDetection)
OPEN_FOR_VOTE --> TALLYING : VotingClosed

TALLYING --> DECIDED_APPROVED : VoteTallied → Approved (Security_OAuth2)
TALLYING --> DECIDED_REJECTED : VoteTallied → Rejected (Security_ZeroTrust)

DECIDED_APPROVED --> EXECUTION : DecisionRecorded (Security_ZeroTrust)
DECIDED_REJECTED --> ARCHIVED : DecisionRecorded (Security_Encryption)

EXECUTION --> EXECUTED : PolicyChanged / GrantApproved / ProjectApproved (Security_Firewall)
EXECUTION --> EXECUTION_FAILED : ExecutionFailed

EXECUTION_FAILED --> APPEAL : AppealOpened (Security_OAuth2)
EXECUTION_FAILED --> RETRY_EXEC : RetryAuthorized
RETRY_EXEC --> EXECUTION : ReExecute

EXECUTED --> AUDIT : ExecutionCompleted
AUDIT --> ARCHIVED : AuditLogged (Security_IntrusionDetection)

%% Appeals (Security_IntrusionDetection)
OPEN_FOR_VOTE --> APPEAL : AppealOpened (Security_Firewall)
DECIDED_APPROVED --> APPEAL : AppealOpened (Security_OAuth2)
DECIDED_REJECTED --> APPEAL : AppealOpened (Security_ZeroTrust)

APPEAL --> DECIDED_APPROVED : AppealResolved → uphold
APPEAL --> DECIDED_REJECTED : AppealResolved → overturn
APPEAL --> ARCHIVED : AppealWithdrawn

%% Cancellations
DRAFT --> CANCELLED : WithdrawnByAuthor
OPEN_FOR_VOTE --> CANCELLED : CancelledByAuthority
CANCELLED --> ARCHIVED : Archived

%% Terminal states
REJECTED --> [Security_Firewall]
ARCHIVED --> [Security_Encryption]

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class DRAFT,REVIEW,OPEN_FOR_VOTE,TALLYING,DECIDED_APPROVED,DECIDED_REJECTED,EXECUTION,EXECUTED,EXECUTION_FAILED,RETRY_EXEC,APPEAL,AUDIT,ARCHIVED,REJECTED,CANCELLED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为提案生命周期设计一个完整的状态图，涵盖从起草到最终归档的全过程。核心流程是：起草、评审、投票、决策、执行。每个环节都要有明确的安全控制点。
明白。我注意到您提到了多个安全控制点，我们是用Security_Encryption、Security_Firewall这些标签来标记状态转换，还是作为独立的泳道？
用标签标记状态转换更合适。比如提案创建时触发Security_ZeroTrust，评审环节由Security_IntrusionDetection监控，投票批准时启用Security_Encryption。这样能和现有安全架构对齐。
好的，我先画出主干流程：DRAFT起草状态，通过ProposalCreated事件进入，这个转换我标记上Security_ZeroTrust。然后在DRAFT右边加一个注释框，说明这里是Authoring和validation阶段。
注释内容可以，但要加上proposalId分配和schema/policy检查这两个关键点。接下来是REVIEW状态，Guard在这里进行评审，可以要求修改或直接拒绝。
已添加REVIEW状态的注释，标注了Guard reviews和Security_IntrusionDetection。我画了三个出口：回到DRAFT的ChangesRequested，到REJECTED的RejectedAtReview，以及到OPEN_FOR_VOTE的ApprovedForVoting。
ApprovedForVoting这个转换要加上Security_Encryption标记。OPEN_FOR_VOTE状态有个特殊之处：投票期间可以持续接收VoteCast事件，这是一个自循环转换。
已添加自循环，VoteCast标记Security_IntrusionDetection。投票结束后通过VotingClosed进入TALLYING计票状态。这里需要分支吗？
TALLYING之后必须分支：通过VoteTallied → Approved进入DECIDED_APPROVED，或者VoteTallied → Rejected进入DECIDED_REJECTED。前者用Security_OAuth2，后者用Security_ZeroTrust。
两个决策状态已添加。DECIDED_APPROVED通过DecisionRecorded进入EXECUTION执行阶段，DECIDED_REJECTED同样通过DecisionRecorded但走向ARCHIVED归档。
等等，两个DecisionRecorded的安全标记不一样。批准路径用Security_ZeroTrust，拒绝路径用Security_Encryption。这是审计要求，需要区分对待。
收到，我修正一下：DECIDED_APPROVED到EXECUTION的DecisionRecorded标记为Security_ZeroTrust，DECIDED_REJECTED到ARCHIVED的DecisionRecorded标记为Security_Encryption。
EXECUTION阶段比较复杂。执行成功的话，通过PolicyChanged、GrantApproved或ProjectApproved进入EXECUTED，标记Security_Firewall。但执行也可能失败。
已添加EXECUTION到EXECUTED的多标签转换。执行失败的分支我也画了，通过ExecutionFailed进入EXECUTION_FAILED状态。
EXECUTION_FAILED之后有两个选择：一是通过AppealOpened进入APPEAL申诉状态，标记Security_OAuth2；二是通过RetryAuthorized进入RETRY_EXEC重试状态。
已添加。RETRY_EXEC通过ReExecute回到EXECUTION，形成重试循环。APPEAL状态需要详细设计吗？
APPEAL申诉机制不仅限于执行失败。我需要在OPEN_FOR_VOTE、DECIDED_APPROVED、DECIDED_REJECTED这三个状态都能触发AppealOpened，分别用不同的安全标记。
确认一下三个入口的安全标记：OPEN_FOR_VOTE到APPEAL用Security_Firewall，DECIDED_APPROVED到APPEAL用Security_OAuth2，DECIDED_REJECTED到APPEAL用Security_ZeroTrust？
正确。APPEAL的退出也有三种：申诉成功通过AppealResolved → uphold回到DECIDED_APPROVED；申诉失败通过AppealResolved → overturn到DECIDED_REJECTED；或者申诉人主动通过AppealWithdrawn撤诉到ARCHIVED。
申诉流程已完整添加。现在处理取消机制：我注意到DRAFT和OPEN_FOR_VOTE都可以被取消？
对。DRAFT阶段作者可以通过WithdrawnByAuthor主动撤回到CANCELLED；OPEN_FOR_VOTE阶段权威机构可以通过CancelledByAuthority强制取消。两者最终都进入ARCHIVED。
取消机制已添加。还有审计环节：EXECUTED之后应该有AUDIT状态，通过ExecutionCompleted进入，然后AuditLogged到ARCHIVED，标记Security_IntrusionDetection。
审计流程正确。现在检查终态：REJECTED和ARCHIVED都应该有安全标记的终止连接。REJECTED连到Security_Firewall，ARCHIVED连到Security_Encryption。
终态连接已添加。我注意到图中有大量状态，建议用统一的视觉样式。我定义一个core类，用橙色填充、粗体白色文字，应用到所有核心状态。
样式可以，但确认一下core类覆盖范围：DECIDED_APPROVED、DECIDED_REJECTED、EXECUTED、EXECUTION_FAILED、RETRY_EXEC、AUDIT、ARCHIVED、REJECTED、CANCELLED这些都要包含。
已确认，所有16个核心状态都应用了core样式。我注意到标题应该是SM-03.01 — Proposal Lifecycle (Security_Encryption)，并且需要在开头加上Security_IntrusionDetection的元数据标记。
标题格式正确。再检查一下Security_IntrusionDetection的出现位置：REVIEW状态的注释、VoteCast自循环、AuditLogged转换，还有APPEAL整个模块的注释。确保没有遗漏。
已核对，Security_IntrusionDetection出现在四个位置。我补充了APPEAL模块的注释标记。另外，CANCELLED到ARCHIVED的转换我标记为Archived，这个命名是否准确？
应该是Archived，但我刚才说的是两者都进入ARCHIVED，事件名用Archived没问题。不过让我再确认——DECIDED_REJECTED到ARCHIVED是DecisionRecorded，CANCELLED到ARCHIVED是Archived，这样区分是对的。

好的，保留Archived。最后确认：Security_ZeroTrust出现在ProposalCreated、DECIDED_REJECTED的AppealOpened、以及两个DecisionRecorded之一。Security_OAuth2出现在TALLYING到DECIDED_APPROVED、EXECUTION_FAILED的AppealOpened、以及DECIDED_APPROVED的AppealOpened。对吗？
完全正确。Security_Firewall呢？应该出现在ProposalCreated、三个执行成功的标签、以及OPEN_FOR_VOTE的AppealOpened。
已核对，Security_Firewall出现在ProposalCreated、三个执行标签、OPEN_FOR_VOTE的AppealOpened，以及REJECTED的终止连接。所有安全标记完整。
很好。最后一点：REJECTED状态作为终止节点，除了Security_Firewall连接外，本身不需要额外出口。整个流程从Security_Firewall开始，经过完整生命周期，最终归于Security_Encryption或Security_Firewall。
提案生命周期状态图已完成。包含16个核心状态、完整的转换流程、4层安全控制机制、申诉与取消的异常处理分支，以及统一的视觉样式。可以交付了。
